name: parallel-analysis
description: Analyze a codebase change from multiple angles in parallel (security, performance, architecture), then synthesize findings. Demonstrates parallel fan-out with dependency fan-in, conditional steps, and input-based gating.

changeset.description: Description of the code change or PR to analyze.

includeSecurity.description: Whether to run the security analysis pass.

includePerformance.description: Whether to run the performance analysis pass.

steps.label: Security analysis
Performance analysis
Architecture review
Synthesize findings
